content: We can reframe LLM self-reflection mechanisms as a dynamic lexical evolution of the core linguistic concept of reflexion, where the autonomous Reflexion AI agent turns the human cognitive/language practice of reflective thinking into a replicable, computational memory architecture for large models. Just as human learners deepen understanding through explicit reflective writing practice (taught in high English curricula as the skill of 'reflexion'), LLMs can be trained to deepen their reasoning by formalizing that same deliberate reflective practice into structured dynamic memory.
